newsSince: No new material company news since June 9. FY2026 results (underlying NPAT +24% to A$363M, rev +11% to A$3.3B, final dividend +17%) were the prior driver. The only fresh item is S&P/ASX 50 inclusion (effective June 22), a passive-flow/crowding event that raises ownership but adds no AI-verification evidence.

verdicts.rankRationale: Strict latent-AI lens, testing/inspection theme. Strong FY2026 results but commodities/life-sciences driven, not AI verification. ASX 50 inclusion (eff Jun 22) is passive-flow crowding, not AI evidence. Small negative drift; hold after prior down-move.
verdicts.bull: Global testing/inspection leader could verify coolants, water, materials and emissions for AI data-center buildouts; record FY2026 profitability.
verdicts.neutral: Quality TIC compounder, but the AI-infrastructure verification pathway is latent and unproven in the numbers.
verdicts.bear: Growth is commodities-led; ASX 50 inclusion raises crowding/ownership without any AI catalyst, eroding residual latent-AI alpha.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Explicit AI-data-center environmental/materials testing mandates that materialize the latent thesis.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Remains a commodities-cycle TIC name with rising passive crowding and no AI-node evidence.
